note: OrangeGlow + MistBridge are structurally near-identical (negative top-margin, vw blooms, mix-blend:screen, overflow:visible, aria-hidden). A single prop-driven SectionBridge (variant: warm|mist) is the obvious extraction, but both are hard-wired to the home seam. Neither is in any registry. preparer records only; extraction goes to component-forge.

existing_transitions_audit.OrangeGlow: page-local (home fire-seam; --fire/orange; vw-overflow; bespoke — do not generalize, not in library)
existing_transitions_audit.MistBridge: dead (muddy #2a2724 ramp + screen-blend; JSX commented on home; code kept). NOTE: blur/haze seam transitions DROPPED by user decision 2026-06-17 — no tr-mist-bridge/tr-blur-bridge in library.
existing_transitions_audit.band-alternation: keep (default for low-contrast light<->soft) + supplement high-contrast seams with tr-gradient-bridge / tr-glow-crossover / tr-masked-divider (raw black<->white hard-cut judged weak)

transitions.name: OrangeGlow
transitions.type: warm transition + soft gradient bridge + glow bloom

transitions.name: MistBridge
transitions.status: DEAD — imported but JSX commented out in page.tsx ('kept for upcoming iteration'); styles live, never rendered

transitions.name: Neutral Gradient Bridge
transitions.type: neutral cross-surface gradient bridge (in-flow band element)
transitions.implementation: <div class='tr-gradient-bridge' data-from data-to aria-hidden> placed between two sections; linear-gradient(in oklab to bottom, var(--from) 0%, var(--to) 100%); height clamp(48px,7vh,112px); data-from/to map to --bg/--bg-soft/--bg-ink
transitions.overlap_depth: none (in-flow, own height; neighbours need no negative margin)
transitions.mobile_fallback: height clamp collapses toward ~48-57px; no JS
transitions.reduced_motion: n/a (static); any future opt-in fade only via ScrollFX data-reveal
transitions.note: EXTENDED batch 2: per-direction multi-stop ramps for all 6 directions (light<->soft short/near-flat; soft->ink/light->ink/ink->light/ink->soft asymmetric, faint cool midpoint). Hex stops (raw oklab() stops break Next16 Lightning CSS — see memory). Distinct from SectionBridge(warm|mist) extraction.

transitions.name: Hard Surface Cut
transitions.type: intentional surface cut (zero-height modifier; 1px hairline on ink)
transitions.intent: default for low-contrast light<->soft seams; use sparingly on high-contrast

transitions.name: Pattern Dissolve
transitions.type: surface gradient + low-opacity pattern (dot/line) dissolving top/bottom
constraints: section-boundary dissolve only; NOT page-level continuation (blocked by surface ownership)

transitions.name: Masked Divider
transitions.type: soft-mask boundary (diagonal split or convex dome; lens-aperture grammar)
constraints: no edge glow/shadow (anti-template); one per page

transitions.name: Glow Crossover
transitions.type: section-modifier glow bleeding across seam (violet/lavender/cyan, contained)
constraints: violet/cyan only; NO orange; NO --lens fill; composited <=0.18

registration.note: registered as blocked; architectural value preserved

reasons: page owns cross-section overlap; Lab sections lack transparent/inherit surface
